Groq API Key Get key ↗
Your key is stored only in this device's local storage and never sent anywhere except Groq's API.
How to Use AI Roadmap
1. Save your API key above.
2. Tap ✦ MAP in the header.
3. Choose Study Roadmap or Execution Plan.
4. Enter your goal, context, and deadline.
5. Use 🎤 for voice input on any field.
6. Tap Generate — your plan appears below.
